Field Notes

Practical guides for animal welfare teams.

Technology

Why Animal Welfare Software Should Be Local-First

Shelter and rescue teams work in places with spotty internet, manage sensitive records, and operate on zero budget for cloud subscriptions. Local-first software is the only architecture that respects those constraints.

Jan 15, 2025
Funding

The Open Paw Funding Radar: Finding Grants Without Losing the Plot

Grant research is slow, deadline-driven, and easy to drop when you're also managing 40 animals. Funding Radar is built to make it survivable.

Jan 22, 2025
Operations

How to Track Foster Capacity Without a Spreadsheet Explosion

Foster networks live and die by capacity tracking. Here's how to do it without a 47-tab spreadsheet that only one person understands.

Jan 29, 2025
Medical

A Simple Vaccine Reminder Workflow for Rescue Teams

Missed vaccines are one of the most common preventable issues in rescue operations. Here's a workflow that makes them hard to miss.

Feb 5, 2025
Adoptions

How to Write Better Adoption Bios With AI and Human Review

A good adoption bio gets animals adopted faster. AI can help write the first draft. Here's how to use it without losing your voice or accuracy.

Operations

What Small Rescues Need From Software Before They Need AI

AI features are exciting. But most small rescues would benefit more from reliable record-keeping and a simple task system first.

Feb 19, 2025
Technology

Open Source for Shelters: What Data Portability Actually Means

Data portability is often promised and rarely delivered. Here's what it actually means and why it matters for animal welfare organizations.

Feb 26, 2025
Operations

Lost and Found Workflows That Help Reunite Pets Faster

The best reunifications happen within 24 hours. After that, chances drop sharply. Here's how to build a workflow that works fast.

Operations

How Fiscal Sponsors Can Support Animal Welfare Programs With Shared Tools

Fiscal sponsorship is a growing model for animal welfare. Here's how shared software infrastructure can reduce overhead for both sponsors and sponsored programs.

Operations

Felipe Reviews Your Intake Workflow

A fictional rescue coordinator reviews common intake workflow mistakes and what to do instead.

Open Paw

Free, open-source, local-first software for animal rescues, shelters, and welfare teams.
